overview: SecondSell is a secondhand marketplace where users can list items for sale with images, price, and condition; browse and filter listings by category; purchase through Stripe-powered checkout; and manage their listings and order history through user profiles.
features: List items with up to 5 photos, price, category, and condition
Browse and search listings with category filters and sort options
Item detail pages with full image gallery and buy button
Stripe-powered checkout with order history and status tracking
User profiles with active and sold listing management
Seller trust signals and condition badges on listings
Recently Viewed section and price range filter on browse page
